name: Variations for French Dressing
recipeIngredient: Blue cheese or Roquefort cheese (1 tablespoon, mashed)
recipeInstructions:
1. Mash the avocado.
2. If using blue cheese or Roquefort cheese, mash it as well.
3. Crumble the hard-boiled egg and combine with hot pepper sauce.
4. Add lemon juice.
5. Include soy sauce (use a salt-free variety).
Food Exchanges per serving:
- Avocado Dressing: 1 FAT EXCHANGE
- Cheese Dressing: 1/4 MEAT EXCHANGE
- Egg dressing: 1 MEAT EXCHANGE
- Lemon Dressing: Free
- Soy Sauce Dressing: Free
